text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon has managed to leave quite a mark
on the Twinkle Series.

Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

Speaking of Smart Falcon—she's singing in front
of her fans again today.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And that concludes today's performance! ☆
Thank you for coming again this week!
Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text: You were as amazing as ever today, Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thank you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The sun today really made for the best spotlight
possible!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If it was cloudy, I'm sure I'd look completely
different.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I'm super cute in any conditions,
though! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
You said it!
Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You know, I was surprised to see you're still out
here singing on the street!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Why's that?

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you're a top Umadol already. You get to
sing on the biggest stages.

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yet you still come here every week to perform.
Isn't it a lot of work?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Yeah, it can be!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: These days, I don't have to worry about what time the sunshine will make me look the best...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I don't need to make all my own background
music or hand out flyers by myself either...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I do get help with lining everyone up and
ticketing and stuff!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan C
text_block_list.text: You're her manager?! Well, don't be a stranger!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan D
text_block_list.text:
We'd be happy to help if you just ask! We'd do
anything for our beloved Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you, everybody! ♪ But it's okay!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I want you all to just sit back and enjoy the music!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: My stage is wherever my fans are.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And I'll keep singing as long as I have feelings I
want to share!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That goes for tomorrow, and the day after that!
I'll be everybody's Umadol forever and ever! ☆
